title: Sushi-Style Russian- Inspired Fried Rice
description: A unique fusion of sushi and russian flavors in a fried rice dish, featuring charred notes and a spicy kick.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large skillet over medium-high.
Add the cubed Russian black bread and cook until toasted, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the charred rice and cook for 2-3 minutes, breaking up any clumps with a spatula.
In a small bowl, whisk together the fiery sauce, sushi vinegar, salt, and pepper.
Pour the sauce mixture over the rice mixture and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add the chopped green onions, sour cream, and chopped fresh dill. Stir-fry for another minute.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed.
Transfer the fried rice to a serving platter or individual plates.
Garnish with additional chopped green onions and fresh dill, if desired.
